description: Maxim AI is a platform for evaluating, testing, and observing AI agents and applications. It provides prompt management, datasets, workflows, test runs, alerting, and tracing/observability features for generative AI systems.
summary: getmaxim.ai exposes a documented REST API at https://api.getmaxim.ai, a separate OTLP HTTP ingestion endpoint at https://api.getmaxim.ai/v1/otel, and a downloadable `maxim` CLI; all require a Maxim-issued API key, and OTLP also requires a Maxim repository ID header.
